description:
In this video I show how to fine-tune a small open source model with Codex using the Hugging Face model trainer skill and HF Jobs. We train `Qwen/Qwen3-0.6B` into a customer-support ticket router on the Bitext dataset, then compare before/after behavior with JSON/schema routing metrics. I also cover setup prerequisites, run monitoring, and how to deploy the result as a lightweight service.

Connect with me 🤗
- X: https://x.com/_alejandroao
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alejandro-ao/

Links
- Code: https://github.com/huggingface/hub-tutorials/blob/main/notebooks/06-hf-model-trainer-skill.ipynb
- Model Trainer Skill: https://github.com/huggingface/skills/tree/main/skills/hugging-face-model-trainer
- Release Blog Post: https://huggingface.co/blog/hf-skills-training

🤓 Topics Covered
- Codex + Hugging Face Jobs workflow
- Qwen3 ticket-router fine-tuning setup
- Before/after eval and cost breakdown

⏱️ Timestamps
0:00 Intro and goal
1:05 Ticket-routing app framing
2:14 Model and dataset selection
5:04 Notebook setup and pre-finetune baseline
9:40 Prompt and training requirements
13:50 Submit training job
14:45 Monitor training outputs
17:18 Cost review
18:10 Results and before/after demo
fulltitle: Fine-Tune an Open Source LLM with Claude Code/Codex (Hugging Face Model Trainer Skill)
creator: Alejandro AO, HuggingFace
